steps.title: Explain the recruitment result
steps.content: The seeds had the desired characteristics and, with minimal guidance, recruited many people who also had those characteristics. The explanation must show why their networks would produce matching recruits.

steps.title: Use shared network traits
steps.content: If the seeds' social networks include many people who share their traits, the strong recruitment result follows. A points to few shared characteristics, C discusses network size, and D concerns whether traits are known, none of which explains the success. The answer is B.
